archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Modified for Cold Industrial/Viking)
design_philosophy: Blackened viking forge. Dark steel, brushed metal, pure cold silver accents. No warm colors (no orange/fire). Focus on monochrome textures, sparks, and high-end automotive craftsmanship.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-white
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-medium tracking-tight text-slate-200

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid for gallery, wide gaps (gap-8), asymmetric overlaps.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-800 text-white border border-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-700 hover:border-slate-400 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-slate-300 border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-400 hover:text-white transition-all duration-300

motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion.hover: Subtle border illuminations (tracing beam style) and text color brightens.
motion.reveal: Fade up with slight y-axis translation on scroll.

hero_bg.description: Moody dark sports car in garage, heavily desaturated with black overlay

artisan.description: Welder working with TIG, sparks flying (apply grayscale filter)

media.image_treatment: All images MUST have grayscale/desaturated CSS filters (`grayscale` or `saturate-0`) to match the cold steel aesthetic. Ensure high contrast and crushed blacks.

sections_instructions.name: Hero
sections_instructions.content: Valhalla Exhausts logo. Tagline: 'Escapes artesanales forjados como en el Valhalla'. Primary CTA: 'WhatsApp' / 'Pedir Presupuesto'. Secondary: 'Ver trabajos'.
sections_instructions.design: Massive viewport height (min-h-screen). Very dark `bg-black/80` overlay over the `hero_bg` image. Place the logo prominently. No form, just buttons.

sections_instructions.name: Sobre el artesano
sections_instructions.content: Short bio about the craftsman, TIG welding expertise, handmade approach.
sections_instructions.design: Two columns: left is the artisan image (grayscale, sharp borders, max-h-[80vh]), right is typography. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for the heading. High negative space.

sections_instructions.name: Galería de escapes
sections_instructions.design: Bento Grid (Mode A). Overlapping elements, asymmetrical. Use gallery images provided.

sections_instructions.name: Proceso artesanal
sections_instructions.content: Steps: 1. Diseño 2. Corte 3. Soldadura TIG 4. Pulido 5. Instalación.
sections_instructions.design: Vertical timeline or 5-column bento. Dark cards with cold silver 1px borders (`border-slate-800`). Add 'Tracing Beam' or subtle hover glows.

sections_instructions.name: Testimonios
sections_instructions.content: 3-4 client quotes with car models (e.g., 'BMW M3 e46', 'Nissan 350Z').
sections_instructions.design: Glassmorphism cards (`bg-white/5`, `backdrop-blur-xl`, `border-white/10`). Minimalist layout. Quotation marks in silver.

sections_instructions.name: Contacto
sections_instructions.content: Massive tactile buttons for WhatsApp, Instagram, Email. NO forms.
sections_instructions.design: Footer takes full viewport height (`min-h-screen` or `py-32`). Enormous text. Buttons should feel like heavy steel plates with cold silver hover states.

technical_rules.components: Avoid pre-built structural cards from UI libraries. Build custom using div and Tailwind to match the raw/viking aesthetic. DO NOT use generic Shadcn cards.
